title: Notifications -  Update successful OFF
scenario: Device Software Update notification appears despite being turned OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts when firmware update completes in background
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
Go to App Settings (gear icon or menu).
Navigate to General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
Set 'Device Software Update' notifications to OFF.
Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
Initiate a firmware update for the connected device.
While the firmware update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
Observe the Android notification shade and any pop-up notifications on the screen.
expected: No notification appears on the Android device upon successful firmware update completion, because Device Software Update notifications are turned OFF.
